## Test Plan

- [ ] I ran the GUI startup path.
- [ ] I validated profiling flow on at least one sample.

## Governance Checklist

- [ ] I did not push directly to `main`.
- [ ] Attribution and license files remain intact (`LICENSE`, `COPYRIGHT.md`).
- [ ] If behavior changed, user-facing docs were updated.
